findings.title: Race condition: unsynchronized lazy init of _event_token_service singleton
findings.description: Module-level _event_token_service initialized via async function without lock. Multiple concurrent activities race to construct OAuthTokenService instances.
findings.suggested_fix: Use asyncio.Lock to guard double-checked init.

findings.title: Race condition: concurrent appends to shared uploaded list in upload_prefix
findings.description: Concurrent coroutines in asyncio.gather mutate shared list. On exception, list left in inconsistent state.
findings.suggested_fix: Have _upload_one return key, collect via asyncio.gather, filter results.

findings.title: Blocking engine.connect() called directly in async context in run_query
findings.description: Synchronous with self.engine.connect() blocks event loop. Prevents heartbeats in Temporal activities.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap in asyncio.to_thread or restructure to acquire connection inside executor.

findings.title: Mutable default argument {} in BaseSQLClient.__init__
findings.description: credentials: Dict[str, Any] = {} as default arg. Shared dict across all callers using default.
findings.suggested_fix: Use None default and assign in body.

findings.title: Non-deterministic random.randint() for lock slot — retries leak locks
findings.description: Random slot on each attempt means retry picks different slot, leaking prior slot until TTL.
findings.suggested_fix: Derive slot deterministically: slot = (hash(owner_id) + activity.info().attempt) % max_locks

findings.title: Mutable class-level default dict shared across BaseSQLClient instances
findings.description: Class-level credentials: Dict[str, Any] = {} shared across all instances until __init__ overrides.
findings.suggested_fix: Use None as class-level default.

findings.title: Mutable default argument {} in BaseClient.__init__
findings.description: credentials: Dict[str, Any] = {} and http_headers: HeaderTypes = {} as defaults.
findings.suggested_fix: Use None default and assign in body.

findings.title: Race condition: _collected_outputs pop without lock in workflow finally block
findings.description: Activity interceptor appends under _lock but workflow finally pops without acquiring lock.
findings.suggested_fix: Acquire _lock in finally block when popping.

findings.title: except (Exception, BaseException) swallows CancelledError during heartbeat cleanup
findings.description: Broad catch suppresses asyncio.CancelledError from activity cancellation signal.
findings.suggested_fix: Catch only Exception, not BaseException. Re-raise CancelledError.

findings.title: _safe_log (workflow-only API) called from @task activity context
findings.description: cleanup_files and cleanup_storage use _safe_log which calls workflow.logger — invalid in activity context.
findings.suggested_fix: Use module-level logger inside @task methods instead of _safe_log.

findings.title: Potential UnboundLocalError for total_files in create_current_state_snapshot
findings.description: total_files assigned inside try block; return statement references it without fallback init.
findings.suggested_fix: Initialize total_files = 0 before the try block.

findings.title: Lexicographic version sort — incorrect for semver
findings.description: sorted(versions.keys())[-1] gives wrong result: 1.10.0 < 1.9.0 lexicographically.
findings.suggested_fix: Use packaging.version.Version for sorting.

findings.title: Retry policy passes error name strings where Temporal expects exception types
findings.description: non_retryable_errors stores strings but Temporal expects Sequence[type[BaseException]]. Non-retryable filtering silently broken.
findings.suggested_fix: Resolve string names to actual exception types or verify Temporal SDK accepts strings.

findings.title: Blocking obstore.list() in async task cleanup_storage starves event loop
findings.description: obs.list() is synchronous iterator doing blocking I/O in async Temporal activity context.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap in asyncio.to_thread or use storage.batch.list_keys which does this correctly.

findings.title: except KeyError never catches actual TypeError when converter not found
findings.description: registry.get() returns None, calling None() raises TypeError not KeyError.
findings.suggested_fix: Check if converter_func is None before call. Remove except KeyError.

findings.title: except CommonError misses KeyError from query.format() missing placeholders
findings.description: query.format() raises KeyError for missing placeholders, not CommonError.
findings.suggested_fix: Add KeyError to except clause.

findings.title: get_database_names passes potentially None prepared_query to sql_client
findings.description: prepare_query() can return None; no null check before passing to get_results.
findings.suggested_fix: Add if prepared_query is None: return None.

findings.title: Connection closes before lazy chunk iterator is consumed in _execute_query
findings.description: with engine.connect() closes connection when block exits, but chunked iterator returned hasn't been consumed yet.
findings.suggested_fix: Materialize chunks within context manager or manage connection lifecycle differently.

findings.title: setup_database_connection mutates credentials dict in-place across loop iterations
findings.description: Each iteration modifies shared credentials dict; failures leave wrong database in state.
findings.suggested_fix: Create deepcopy before modifying or ensure parse_credentials_extra returns new dict.

findings.title: AsyncBaseSQLClient.run_query calls synchronous fetchmany without executor
findings.description: Non-server-side-cursor path calls result.cursor.fetchmany() synchronously, blocking event loop.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap in asyncio.to_thread().
